purpose: Provide an architectural pattern harvest from current agent/tool systems and translate useful patterns into IMPERIUM-native contracts before Administratum-Agent V1 implementation.
not_scope: No prompt drafting unless Owner explicitly commands
owner_intent: Use this pack as supporting material when giving Servitor a later task to implement Administratum-Agent V1 from the committed PDFs while considering harvested architectural patterns.

allowed_use: Use as design input for Administratum-Agent V1 implementation planning.
Use as pattern source for Organ-Agent protocol drafts.
Do not install or adopt external frameworks from this pack.
future_considerations_not_introduced: Python rich for CLI visual comfort
Textual-style renderer for future interactive CLI/TUI
